# The Grand LB

> SoCal's premier 40,000 sq ft event venue in Long Beach, CA. Weddings, quinceañeras, corporate events, galas, and private celebrations. 20 minutes from LAX.

The Grand Long Beach is a full-service event venue operated by Choura Venue Services LLC. Located at 4101 E. Willow St., Long Beach, CA 90815. Phone: (562) 426-0555.

## Venue Spaces

The Grand LB has seven distinct indoor and outdoor event spaces:

- **The Grand Ballroom** — largest space, up to 675 guests
- **The Palm Terrace** — outdoor courtyard space
- **The Catalina Room** — mid-size indoor space
- **The Monarch Room** — mid-size indoor space
- **The Garden Room** — intimate indoor/outdoor space
- **The Pacific Room** — flexible breakout or ceremony space
- **The Board Room** — executive meeting room, up to 40 guests

## Events Hosted

Weddings, Indian weddings, quinceañeras, sweet 16 parties, bar and bat mitzvahs, graduation parties, anniversary parties, baby showers, rehearsal dinners, galas, corporate meetings, conferences, trade shows, fundraisers, product launches, award ceremonies, and more.

## Catering

In-house kitchen with full-service catering. Plated dinners, buffet, and action stations. Customizable menus including Classic, Weddings, Corporate, and Milestones packages. Accommodates vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, kosher-style, halal, and other dietary needs. Hosted and cash bar options available.

## Key Details

- Total venue size: 40,000 sq ft
- Guest capacity: 40–675 depending on space
- On-site parking: up to 500 cars, complimentary
- Valet parking available
- ADA accessible
- Bilingual staff (English and Spanish)
- 20 minutes from LAX
